title: sphenopholis interrupta subsp. interrupta
intro: Sphenopholis interrupta subsp. interrupta, also known as the interrupted sphenopholis, is a type of grass native to North America. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphenopholis interrupta subsp. interrupta include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
